lines.english: Where is Captain Alison going and how?
lines.chinese: 艾莉森船长要去哪里，怎么去？
lines.raw: Where is Captain Alison going and how? | 艾莉森船长要去哪里，怎么去？

lines.english: Our neighbour, Captain Charles Alison, will sail from Portsmouth tomorrow.
lines.chinese: 我们的邻居，查尔斯·艾莉森船长，明天将从朴茨茅斯启航。
lines.raw: Our neighbour, Captain Charles Alison, will sail from Portsmouth tomorrow. | 我们的邻居，查尔斯·艾莉森船长，明天将从朴茨茅斯启航。

lines.english: We'll meet him at the harbour early in the morning.
lines.chinese: 我们明天一早将在港口与他会合。
lines.raw: We'll meet him at the harbour early in the morning. | 我们明天一早将在港口与他会合。

lines.english: He will be in his small boat, Topsail.
lines.chinese: 他将乘坐他的小船“上帆号”。
lines.raw: He will be in his small boat, Topsail. | 他将乘坐他的小船“上帆号”。

lines.english: Topsail is a famous little boat.
lines.raw: Topsail is a famous little boat. | “上帆号”是一艘著名的小船。

lines.english: It has sailed across the Atlantic many times.
lines.chinese: 它已经多次横渡大西洋。
lines.raw: It has sailed across the Atlantic many times. | 它已经多次横渡大西洋。

lines.english: Captain Alison will set out at eight o'clock,
lines.chinese: 艾莉森船长将在八点钟出发，
lines.raw: Captain Alison will set out at eight o'clock, | 艾莉森船长将在八点钟出发，

lines.english: so we'll have plenty of time.
lines.chinese: 所以我们有充足的时间。
lines.raw: so we'll have plenty of time. | 所以我们有充足的时间。

lines.english: We'll see his boat and then we'll say goodbye to him.
lines.chinese: 我们将去看他的船，然后向他告别。
lines.raw: We'll see his boat and then we'll say goodbye to him. | 我们将去看他的船，然后向他告别。

lines.english: He will be away for two months.
lines.raw: He will be away for two months. | 他将离开两个月。

lines.english: We are very proud of him.
lines.chinese: 我们为他感到非常自豪。
lines.raw: We are very proud of him. | 我们为他感到非常自豪。

lines.english: He will take part in an important race across the Atlantic.
lines.chinese: 他将参加一场重要的横渡大西洋的比赛。
lines.raw: He will take part in an important race across the Atlantic. | 他将参加一场重要的横渡大西洋的比赛。
